interaction.prompt: You have the puck on the right wall. Tap the open teammate.

feedback.right: Weak-side wing — cross-ice for the one-timer. The slot and the point are both shadowed.
feedback.wrong: Look at the defenders. Bumper and point both have a stick on them; only the weak-side winger is alone.

tip: On the strong-side wall, scan WEAK-side first. The PK collapses strong, leaving the cross-ice option open.
why: Vision drill: the right read is the one no one is covering. Don't pick by proximity, pick by who has space.
